nasb.text: and five bars for the boards of the other side of the tabernacle, and five bars for the boards of the side of the tabernacle for the rear side to the west.

esv.text: and five bars for the frames of the other side of the tabernacle, and five bars for the frames of the side of the tabernacle at the rear westward.

cnv.text: 為會幕那邊的木板也做五個橫閂，又為會幕的後邊，即西邊的木板，也做五個橫閂。
